reviews.review_description: I bought this for my 9:yr old daughter as she’s a bit behind in math. She’s not into math at all so I tell her she has to do 10 minutes on math world  vr before she can play gorilla tag. She pouts and pulls faces but once she starts playing the games she ends up doing 15-20 mins before she asks me how many minutes are left. She loves beating her high score and shows off her screenshots when she beats it.

developer_response.body:
Hey there Yoda.Fazbear!
We are so glad that your daughter is enjoying Math World VR! Time really does fly when you're having fun. We love the fact that she loves to beat her high scores, they definitely deserved to be shown off! Thank you so much for supporting our game and if you ever have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us at team@skillprepare.com :)

reviews.review_description: Bought this for the family to play at thanksgiving, and I let my son try it out first, and he absolutely loves it!

developer_response.body: Happy Thanksgiving! We're so glad that your son enjoys Math World VR! Thank you for supporting our game and if you ever have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us at team@skillprepare.com :)

reviews.review_description: This game is fun to play with the fam! Could have difficulty levels, but otherwise it's a fun game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Regarding the difficulty levels, our team is currently working on a 'Difficulty level' feature where you can make the math problems harder or easier! Be on the lookout for the next update! Thanks for playing and supporting Math World VR! If you have any other inquiries, please feel free to reach out to team@skillprepare.com

reviews.review_description: My son has so much fun on this app he hardly realizes he’s studying!

developer_response.body: Hey there Sandra! We're so happy that your son is having a blast in Math World VR! Thank you for supporting our game and if you ever have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us at team@skillprepare.com :)

reviews.review_description: This is a great game for elementary school kids starting to learn math. My nephew had a blast playing. Even as an adult the mini games are a lot of fun (I especially liked the basketball game).

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you so much for your support and kind words! We are so glad that your family enjoyed Math World VR and that you were able to enjoy it too! Math World VR is definitely a great way to learn math, but it's also good for sharpening your brain using simple math! If you ever have any questions or need any assistance, please feel free to reach out to support@skillprepare.com.
